name: Rewind
description: It's Rewind time - quickly go back to a previous point in the level!

frames-per-second.name: Frames per second
frames-per-second.description: The amount of captured frames every second.

history-length.name: History length
history-length.description: The length of rewind history stored, in capture frame count. This will be automatically populated on Windows machines with Nvidia or AMD graphics cards by the amount of video memory available.

frame-resolution.name: Frame resolution multiplier
frame-resolution.description: A multiplier for the resolution every frame is captured at.

capture-in-normal-mode.name: Capture frames during non-practice runs
capture-in-normal-mode.description: Enables capturing frames when not in practice mode, to allow rewinding to frames captured before entering practice mode.
